sources.evidence: The supplied Facebook page links directly to modelsband.com; the site identifies Models, publishes the band’s history, music, current news and official contact information.
The supplied mobile share URL resolved to the canonical public page @Models.Band. The page identifies Models as established in 1978 and links back to modelsband.com.
The official Models website links directly to this Spotify artist profile from both its site footer and music page.
The official Models site curates videos from this channel; the channel publishes Models’ official music videos and identifies the artist as Models.
The official Models video page links this clip. The official Models channel showed 555K views, higher than the verified flagship clips I Hear Motion (414K), Barbados (389K) and Big On Love (67K).
The official Models music page directs fans to Warner Music Australia’s Models collection to buy new vinyl editions.
The band’s official website shop lists Models music, clothing and merchandise with active purchase controls.
The January 2026 Sentinel-Times profile interviews Andrew Duffield about Models’ live repertoire, history, continuing studio work and current activity.

sources.sourceType: member personal account linked by official website
sources.evidence: The official site explicitly labels this as “(Mark’s) Instagram”, not an official Models band account; it is therefore intentionally omitted from the edition.
